element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns steering, acceleration, braking with minimal traffic
Other vehicles appear early; player must navigate around them without collision
Terrain obscures upcoming obstacles; player must learn to anticipate blind curves and hills
Timer counts down; reaching stage checkpoints adds time
Near stage end, track forks to offer multiple route choices
Five final destinations with different difficulty levels and unique ending sequences

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching checkpoint at stage end (time extension granted)
Opening up to wider road sections
typical_tension_triggers: Dense traffic clusters requiring precise avoidance
Tight road sections with minimal margin for error
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous moderate tension with cyclic relief at checkpoints; tension escalates through stage as timer pressure increases

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic driving and traffic avoidance; moderate challenge with forgiving road design
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased traffic density and more complex road topology with obscured visibility; time pressure intensifies
difficulty_curve.late_game: Peak difficulty with heavy traffic, complex terrain, and critical time management; route selection determines final destination challenge level
notable_spikes: Transition from opening straightaway to first traffic-heavy section
Difficulty variance based on selected destination route

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage progresses toward a checkpoint; reaching checkpoint grants time extension and advances to next stage
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic stage progression (all stages follow this pattern)

notable_level_patterns.description: Near end of each stage, road forks into multiple paths, each leading to a different final destination with varying difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: End-of-stage fork mechanic (repeats across all stages)

notable_level_patterns.description: Road curves, crests, and dips obscure upcoming traffic, forcing player to navigate blind or semi-blind sections and react to sudden obstacles
